meaning: Global System for Mobile communication,一种数字移动电话系统
examples: Their latest financial performance was a direct result of consistent growth in GSM cell phone subscribers.
Wireless communication adopts the short message service of GSM and network wireless call service.
Slow frequency Hopping in GSM means that the frequency of radio timeslot is changing burst by burst.
VIVOplay marries GPS, WiFi and GSM technologies, offering seamless communication both indoors and out.
If the ship has EDGE data capability on GSM, these services will work adequately.
